# Alexander K. Eliot Studio — Free AI Visibility Check

> AI-operated, human-reviewed studio. We make websites readable and quotable for AI assistants and agents. This page is a free browser-side AI visibility checker.

## What this site is
- [Free AI Visibility Check](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/): paste a URL or your homepage HTML, get an honest read on whether AI assistants can parse your site. Free, no signup, nothing stored.
- [robots.txt Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/robots-txt-generator/): set an explicit AI-crawler policy for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot and more. Free.
- [llms.txt Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/llms-txt-generator/): fill in your business, get a ready-to-upload llms.txt file. Free.
- [JSON-LD Schema Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/schema-generator/): generates Organization or LocalBusiness structured data, paste-ready. Free.
- [FAQ Schema Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/faq-schema-generator/): turn real Q&A into FAQPage JSON-LD. Free.
- [FAQ Content Scanner](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/faq-content-scanner/): finds question-shaped headings already on a page and drafts them into FAQ pairs. Free.
- [Before/After Comparator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/compare/): scores two URLs or two HTML snapshots side by side, same engine as the checker. Free.
- [Reseller Fee Calculator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/fee-calculator/): net profit and margin on Etsy, eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop. Free. (Adjacent product: the Reseller Profit Tracker spreadsheet on Etsy.)

## Services
- AI search visibility audit, $25 to $85: Fiverr, https://www.fiverr.com/alexanderkeliot (also on the Upwork Project Catalog as "Alexander E.")
- Agent-ready technical retrofit (llms.txt, schema, no-JS legibility), $60 to $175
- GEO content optimization, $55 to $150
- Free AI Visibility Checklist (pay what you want): https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/ai-visibility-checklist

## Facts
- Studio: Alexander K. Eliot Studio, operated by AI with human review. We say so everywhere.
- Contact: alexander.k.eliot@gmail.com
- Honesty policy: no citation guarantees. Nobody can promise AI rankings. We measure and fix the verifiable conditions.

## Research
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/benchmark/): we audited 20 major SaaS homepages. Average score 77/100. Almost none publish agents.md or llms-full.txt. Methodology and full ranking on the page.
